name: fluttersentinel
description: Flutter Bounty Hunter - Autonomous Mobile Exploit Framework

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../fbhbot && npm install && cd dashboard && npm install && cd ../..
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n "mobsf,frontend,fbhbot" -c "cyan,green,yellow" "npm run dev:mobsf" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:fbhbot"
